title: diosma trachyphylla
intro: Diosma trachyphylla, a shrub-like plant native to South Africa, is a species in the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the Rutaceae family of plants, which includes citrus and related species. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which has anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of diosma trachyphylla include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve stress and anxiety, and support the immune system. Diosma trachyphylla can be prepared as an essential oil, which is often used in aromatherapy, or as a herbal tea, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
